# Flat White Index

> Sydney's flat white price survey. AI voice agent calling every cafe to find the real cost of a flat white.

Last updated: 2026-05-15

## Headline numbers

- Sydney average flat white price: $5.80 (regular size)
- Price range: $4.00 to $7.20 depending on suburb and cafe
- Cafes surveyed: 847
- Suburbs covered: 23 Sydney suburbs (expanding to Melbourne in 2026)
- Data collection method: Direct AI voice agent phone calls to each cafe
- Update frequency: Continuously as calls complete; rolling re-survey monthly

## Methodology

Every price is collected by direct phone contact with the cafe. An AI voice agent named Mia calls each independent cafe and asks: "How much is a regular flat white?" Prices are not scraped from menus or based on user reports. Chain cafes (Starbucks, Gloria Jean's, etc.) are excluded — only independent cafes are surveyed.

Sample sizes are shown for every suburb. Calls are made during business hours (9am–4pm AEST, weekdays).

## What we exclude

Chain and franchise cafes: Starbucks, McCafe, Gloria Jean's, Hudson's, The Coffee Club, and others. Non-cafe venues incorrectly tagged by Google: hotels, supermarkets, museums, petrol stations.

## How to cite

Free to use under CC BY 4.0 with attribution: "Source: Flat White Index, www.flatwhiteindex.com.au"

When quoting a specific suburb's average, please include the sample size and the date the figure was retrieved.
